category_sources: Official documentation describes Zellij as a terminal workspace.
source_facts.description says Zellij is a pluggable terminal workspace with terminal multiplexer as the base feature.
display_name_sources: Official documentation is titled Zellij User Guide.
source_facts.homepage is zellij.dev and source_facts.name is zellij.
docs_sources: Official Zellij documentation is hosted under zellij.dev/documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official documentation covers CLI control, layouts, and plugins.
source_facts.description identifies a pluggable terminal workspace and terminal multiplexer.
